Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-23 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Today's data reveals an extraordinary outlier in TNGX, which ranks #1 with a composite score of 94.6—driven by a stunning 1009.61% one-year return and exceptional ratio consistency (5/5 passes). TNGX's momentum is notably "clean" with minimal correlation to broad indices, though its 1.7% daily return suggests the extreme gains are historical rather than current intraday strength. In contrast, GPRE ranks #2 with a more moderate 204.18% one-year return and a 0.15 bad-SPY score, indicating it held up better during market downturns despite lower absolute returns. The stark difference between these leaders—TNGX's 10x outperformance over GPRE on the 1-year view but GPRE's superior resilience on SPY-down days—suggests today's top momentum names represent two distinct patterns: outlier growth stories versus steadier relative performers. Both pass all SMA gates and show positive short-term momentum, but investors should note that TNGX's outsized gains carry higher concentration risk and volatility typical of extreme movers.
